perspectives.title: Qian (Heaven)
perspectives.text: Qian represents heaven, the ruler, the father, jade, metal, cold, ice, deep red, a fine horse, an old horse, a lean horse, a piebald horse, and the fruit of trees.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Creators
perspectives.text: Wills Receptivity and Nurturing
perspectives.comment: Only project creators are eligible to claim. Money to DUKIGE - We need sin first for survival and then evolve to be love

perspectives.title: Kun (Earth)
perspectives.text: Kun represents earth, the mother, cloth, a cauldron, parsimony, the multitude, a cow with her calf, a large wagon, writing, the masses, a handle, and among the types of soil, it is the black.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Maintainers
perspectives.text: Wills Stillness and Meditation
perspectives.comment: Survival of the fittest. Nothing can skip the rule, we have to survive first and then thrive.

perspectives.title: Kan (Water)
perspectives.text: Kan represents water, ditches, concealment, a bow and wheel. In humans, it means anxiety, heart and ear pain. In horses, a beautiful back and a stumbling gait. It also represents the moon and thieves.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Investors
perspectives.text: Wills Flow and Adaptation
perspectives.comment: You can invest in the DUKI in action project. Money to Investors - Free Will of Goodness needs power to manifest and be useful

perspectives.title: Xun (Wind)
perspectives.text: Xun represents wood, wind, the eldest daughter, a measuring line, work, white, length, height, advance and retreat, and indecisiveness. In humans, it can mean a broad forehead and profiting in trade.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Contributors
perspectives.text: Wills Influence and Penetration
perspectives.comment: As the hexagram Xun says: 'The wind follows, and the noble one carries out his commands.' Only project contributors can claim. Money to Partners - Fostering strategic collaborations and alliances

perspectives.title: Zhen (Thunder)
perspectives.text: Zhen represents thunder, the dragon, dark yellow, a main road, the eldest son, and decisiveness. In horses, a good neigh and a prancing gait. In crops, it represents sprouting anew. It signifies strength and flourishing growth.

perspectives.title: Public Love For Influencers
perspectives.text: Wills Awakening and Mobilization
perspectives.comment: Influencers using their platform or service to amplify positive impact and inspire participation. Only 64 spots available. Apply offline to become an evangelist. Embrace a 'love all' marketing strategy by pledging to donate 1% of profits to humanity, distributed equally if possible, potentially via blockchain in the future like zk-kyc and so on. No donation is required if there are no profits. May your kindness-first actions warm humanity and capture all lives' attention. Money to Influencers - Empowering voices that awaken and mobilize all lives

perspectives.title: Li (Fire)
perspectives.text: Li represents fire, the sun, lightning, the middle daughter, armor and weapons. In humans, a large belly. It represents turtles, crabs, and snails. In trees, those that are dry in their upper parts.

perspectives.title: Public Love For Community
perspectives.text: Wills Clarity and Transformation
perspectives.comment: Gathering flames into brilliance, kindling fire together. Only the lucky community user who wins the lottery is eligible to claim. Money to Pioneers - First adopters and adventurers are the pioneers of the world

perspectives.title: Dui (Lake)
perspectives.text: Dui represents a marsh or lake, the youngest daughter, a sorceress, the mouth and tongue, and destruction. In the earth, it represents hard and salty ground. It also represents a concubine and a sheep.

perspectives.title: Public Love For Nation
perspectives.text: Wills Joy and Satisfaction
perspectives.comment: To benefit all beings, one must be as vast as lakes and seas, embracing all rivers. A nation's tax revenue is essentially the love generated by commercial activity for its people. Web3 does not currently support this, but we hope to see future national-level support for ZK-KYC or ZK-ID to establish a unified WorldID. Money to Nation - A nation of people who love and care for the world

perspectives.title: Gen (Mountain)
perspectives.text: Gen represents a mountain, a footpath, small stones, a gate, fruits and gourds, a gatekeeper, the fingers, a dog, and a rat. In trees, it represents those that are firm and have many knots.

perspectives.title: Public Love For All Lives
perspectives.text: Wills Humanity and Creativity
perspectives.comment: Everyone can claim it. At this stage, we cannot determine whether a wallet corresponds to a unique human being. We simply verify whether there is 1 USDC in the wallet. DUKI is used for all lives, you just need to prove you are a unique human. DUKI needs decentralized zero knowledge proof system to uniquely identify humans. WorldID is not enough for DUKI. Without True Authority, WorldID Could Become a Hoax. Money to World - DUKI in Action to remind all lives that freedom is not free, it needs power to reject evil and do good

perspectives.title: Yin
perspectives.text: Yin symbolizes the earth, the moon, the feminine, night, stillness, receptivity, and gentleness. It is the mother of all things, the source of bearing and nurturing.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Guardians
perspectives.text: Wills of Silent Protection and Selfless Dedication
perspectives.comment: This can be claimed by members who silently protect the community. Thank you for your selfless dedication.

perspectives.title: Old Yin
perspectives.text: Old Yin, the peak of Yin, represents ultimate stillness, winter, midnight, storage, and conclusion. It is the culmination of the receptive phase and the point of rest before a new cycle begins.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Reflectors
perspectives.text: Wills of Deep Contemplation and Crystallizing Wisdom
perspectives.comment: This can be claimed by members who offer deep reflections, helping the community to see the core essence of matters.

perspectives.title: Yang
perspectives.text: Yang symbolizes the sky, the sun, the masculine, daytime, activity, creation, and strength. It is the father of all things, the driving force of initiation and development.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Pioneers
perspectives.text: Wills of Courageous Exploration and Pathfinding
perspectives.comment: This can be claimed by pioneers who open up new directions for the project and explore the unknown.

perspectives.title: Young Yang
perspectives.text: Young Yang, the birth of Yang within Yin, represents new life, spring, morning, hope, and growth. It is the beginning of change, the stirring within stillness.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Inspirers
perspectives.text: Wills of Igniting Inspiration and Enlightening Thought
perspectives.comment: This can be claimed by members who provide constructive suggestions and inspire others in the community.

perspectives.title: Young Yin
perspectives.text: Young Yin, the birth of Yin within Yang, represents convergence, autumn, dusk, tranquility, and maturity. It is the settling of development, the stability within motion.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Summarizers
perspectives.text: Wills of Distilling Experience and Summarizing Wisdom
perspectives.comment: This can be claimed by members who help the community summarize experiences and consolidate knowledge.

perspectives.title: Old Yang
perspectives.text: Old Yang, the peak of Yang, represents ultimate creativity, summer, noon, prosperity, and the apex. It is the culmination of development and also the starting point for change.

perspectives.title: Private Love For Achievers
perspectives.text: Wills of Achieving Excellence and Reaching Milestones
perspectives.comment: This can be claimed by members who have made outstanding contributions or reached significant milestones for the project or community.

perspectives.title: Taiji
perspectives.text: Emerging from the infinite potential of Wuji, Taiji is the unified source from which the dynamic interplay of Yin and Yang arises, governing the cycles of all creation.

perspectives.title: Wille of Love
perspectives.text: Infinite Wills Nurtured by Love
